description: Legal document from Cairo, dated 28 December 1812 CE (25 Tevet 5570 AM) in which David Dayyan b. Avraham declares that he owes 12000 silver medins (מ״כ) to Yehudah Bunān. The document was not witnessed and was reused for scribal practice: a second scribe has copied out the opening of the document three different times on the same page. The remaining pages have been used for sums, accounts, and writing practice.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
